calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anthony J. Grillo for Mayra Irina Duenas, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired about the transfer-on-death designations on the annuities. Counsel explained that while account statements indicated transfer-on-death designations, only one of three accounts had a valid TOD. The other two accounts lacked named beneficiaries due to a setup error when initially established. The petitioner seeks access to these accounts.

The court took the matter under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Deputy: Singh; Not reported (D204)
